title: toString() and clone() methods should not return null
description: Calling toString() or clone() on an object should always return a string or an object. Returning null instead contravenes the method's implicit contract.
recommendation: Ensure toString() and clone() methods always return a string or an object.
impact: Violating the method's implicit contract may lead to unexpected behavior.

checks.message: Ensure toString() and clone() methods always return a string or an object.
